welcome.title: Welcome to AjoLedger
welcome.body: Modernizing community savings with transparency, trust, and simplicity while preserving the Ajo tradition you already know.

recorded.title: Every Payment. Automatically Recorded.
recorded.body: No more spreadsheets or payment receipts. Every contribution is tracked automatically, giving you a clear view of your savings anytime.

confidence.title: Track Your Savings with Confidence.
confidence.body: Know your contribution status, upcoming payouts, and savings progress all in one simple, accessible dashboard designed for everyone.

auth.createPinSubtitle: You will use this PIN to unlock the app.
auth.mockModeHint: Demo mode — auth runs locally without the backend.
auth.socialComingSoonBody: Google and Apple sign-in will be available once the backend is ready.

errors.weakPassword: Password must contain at least 8 characters. Please try again.
errors.pinMismatch: PINs do not match. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.placeholderNote: Dashboard screens will be built here next.
